---
title: "DATASET GENERATION"
author: "Congyu Zhang"
output: html_document
---
# 1. Load packages and set up environment

```{r setup, include=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
rm(list=ls())

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(here)
```

# 2. Import the raw data

```{r, echo=FALSE}
# IRT Model (training)
train_irt <- read.csv(here("data","IRT_data","full_IRT_training.csv"))

#PRO total model (training)
train_total <- read.csv(here("data","PROtotal_data","pro_missing_train.csv"))
```

# 3.1. Synthesis data

```{r, echo=FALSE}
n_patients  <- 30
time_points <- c(0, 7, 14, 28, 35, 42, 49, 56, 63)
vars        <- 1:14
```

## 3.1.1 IRT Model

```{r, echo=FALSE}
set.seed(123)

# Per-patient demographics (one row per patient, same value across 
# all time points)
demo <- data.frame(
  ID         = 1:n_patients,
  AGE        = sample(29:89, n_patients, replace = TRUE),
  SEX        = sample(c(1, 2), n_patients, replace = TRUE),
  ECOG       = sample(c(0, 1, 2, 3), n_patients, replace = TRUE),
  ETHNICITY  = sample(c(0, 1), n_patients, replace = TRUE),
  RACE       = sample(c(0, 1), n_patients, replace = TRUE),
  CANCERTYPE = sample(c(0, 1), n_patients, replace = TRUE),
  IV         = sample(c(0, 1), n_patients, replace = TRUE),
  PO         = sample(c(0, 1), n_patients, replace = TRUE)
)

# Full grid: ID x TIME x VAR -> attach random DV and demographics
synthesis_irt <- expand.grid(
    ID   = 1:n_patients,
    TIME = time_points,
    VAR  = vars
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    DV  = sample(0:3, n(), replace = TRUE),
    DV2 = 4 - DV
  ) %>%
  left_join(demo, by = "ID") %>%
  select(ID, VAR, TIME, DV, DV2, AGE, SEX, ECOG, ETHNICITY, RACE, CANCERTYPE, IV, PO) %>%
  arrange(ID, VAR, TIME)

head(synthesis_irt)

#write.csv(synthesis_irt, here("data","synthesis_IRT.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

```


## 3.1.2 PRO total Model

```{r, echo=FALSE}
set.seed(1234)

# Per-patient demographics (one row per patient, same value across all time points)
demo_total <- data.frame(
  ID         = 1:n_patients,
  AGE        = sample(29:89, n_patients, replace = TRUE),
  SEX        = sample(c(1, 2), n_patients, replace = TRUE),
  ECOG       = sample(c(0, 1, 2, 3), n_patients, replace = TRUE),
  ETHNICITY  = sample(c(0, 1), n_patients, replace = TRUE),
  RACE       = sample(c(0, 1), n_patients, replace = TRUE),
  CANCERTYPE = sample(c(0, 1), n_patients, replace = TRUE),
  IV         = sample(c(0, 1), n_patients, replace = TRUE),
  PO         = sample(c(0, 1), n_patients, replace = TRUE)
)

# Generate DV (0-4) per ID x TIME x VAR, then sum across 14 VARs -> SCORE
synthesis_total <- expand.grid(
    ID   = 1:n_patients,
    TIME = time_points,
    VAR  = vars
  ) %>%
  mutate(DV = sample(0:4, n(), replace = TRUE)) %>%
  group_by(ID, TIME) %>%
  summarise(SCORE = sum(DV), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(demo_total, by = "ID") %>%
  select(ID, TIME, SCORE, AGE, SEX, ECOG, ETHNICITY, RACE, CANCERTYPE, IV, PO) %>%
  arrange(ID, TIME)

head(synthesis_total)

#write.csv(synthesis_total, here("data","synthesis_PROtotal.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```
